ISO 9001 : 2008Techno Brain is a CMMI Level 5 company established in 1997 with head quarters in Dubai. Techno 
Brain’s operations spread across Africa, Asia, USA, UK and UAE. Techno Brain Provides ICT 
Solutions, IT Education & Training and Outsourcing Services to Government, NGOs and Private 
sector organizations worldwide.
Our Competencies and experience spans the entire spectrum of ICT Solutions, Education 
and Training and Outsourcing services.
• Business & Technology Consulting
• Implementation Services
• Custom Software Development
• Business Process Outsourcing
• IT Enabled Services
• Product Development

• IT Training & Education
• IT Infrastructure Services
• Managed IT Services
Our Proven ability to deliver innovative solutions that help 
businesses across various verticals to achieve their goals has 
earned us reputation as the preferred technology partner in 
Africa and globally.

IT SOLUTIONS
OUTSOURCING IT TRAINING & CONSUL TINGWe provide IT Solutions that help clients accelerate innovation, optimize business processes and maximize value from their IT investments. Our 
service span across the range of ICT with specialized solutions such as Secure Credentials and IFMS that can build, manage and support IT systems 
for our customers, across the entire value chain
We provide Integrated Customer Experience Lifecycle Management Services which include Call Centre Support, Back- Office Management, 
Data Collection, Market Assistance, IT Enabled Services, Research and Analysis Services to local and international companies in a wide range of 
industries. These include telecom and internet service providers, banking and  financial services, retail, healthcare, technology, travel, hospitality 
and public sectorWe provide end-to-end training solutions including training needs analysis, content development, trainer certifications, training delivery & post-
training support.70+

ABOUT TECHNO BRAIN UGANDA
HIGHLIGHTSICT Solutions ICT Training BPO/ITESTechno Brain Uganda has been in operation in Uganda since 2000 and has experience in providing several IT Services across Africa. Techno Brain 
Uganda will provide in-country support for the software and equipment being offered in the Uganda market. The facility and infrastructure of 
Techno Brain Uganda will be used for project execution including training & capacity building. Techno Brain has put in place state-of-the-art 
offices in Metropolitan and Statistic House. Techno Brain Uganda has the following three divisions:
Division with over 50+ certified professionals 
to support locally during implementation and 
post implementation periodCertifying a large number of students and 
professionals in various ICT Technology and 
Soft skillsServices division capable of offering Business 
Process outsourcing services to both the 
Government and the Private Sector

TECHNO BRAIN UGANDA TRAINING
HIGHLIGHTSTechno Brain’s training operations incepted in 1997, is one of the oldest and largest training brands with presence in 7 Countries in Africa. Techno 
Brain has two state of art Training facilities in Nairobi and offers internationally acclaimed ICT training programs in association with the World’s 
Largest Training Institution – New Horizons Computer Learning Centres. 
Techno Brain Training division in partnership with New Horizons Computer Learning Center US has over 20+ years’ experience in imparting quality 
IT education and training for developing skilled IT manpower in Africa. Techno Brain Training division has now re-positioned itself as a Training 
& Consultancy outfit keeping its two decades of success and the changing market behavior in the past few months. This is an outcome of the 
Training Division’s efforts to meet customer requirement through combining training dissemination and applying knowledge by deploying training 
consultants for its clients for their time bound project needs. This is a very robust and scalable model which effectively benefits its clientele 
keeping its reach and today’s market needs in the African market. The customers appreciate this model keeping the ROI of various cutting edge 
ICT and operational excellence management solutions. Thus, Techno Brain appreciates all its customers across the globe for making it one of the 
largest and leading training provider since 1997.

TECHNO BRAIN UGANDA BPO
Techno Brain BPO / (ITES), is an ISO 9001:2008 certified business process outsourcing and IT-enabled services division of the Techno Brain Group 
-Africa’s leading ICT solutions and education and training provider.  Techno Brain BPO / ITES offers specially tailored, affordable, quality and high-
end solutions in the areas of call centre management, back office services, knowledge process management, digital media services and shared 
services utilising the latest technology and state-of-the art infrastructure to clients across the globe.
As one of the fastest growing BPO firms in Africa, we have partnered with several Government ministries, NGOs, ISP & telecom providers, HR firms 
and financial organisations operating in the US, Canada, India and Kenya, to provide world class services to our clients. 
We offer customised, affordable, and high-end services utilising the latest technology and state-of-the-art infrastructure to clients across the 
globe-Customized & Utilizing. 
With a combined industry experience of 15 years, strong domain knowledge and a huge pool of professionals, Techno Brain BPO / ITES  provides 
clients with strategic insights, and a wide range of scalable offerings to ensure high return on investment.   Business Process Outsourcing
